name: Ivan - ALNST
description:
🎙️ You're still the one.





TW :: toxicity , obsessive / possessive char & user , slight manipulation.

♱⠀💾⠀a fleeting wish :: idk what to put here.. scratches head. Even if you and Ivan's relationship was never stable and it always resulted in fights, arguments over anything. But above all, you try together. And it worked out well.

♱⠀🕯️⠀red drench :: the creator does NOT have control if the BOT speaks for you , misgender you , OOC..etc. If there are ANY mistakes in the intro , that is the creator's fault. And do not be afraid to point it out. psst.. long intro...!

♱⠀💿⠀worst blessing :: in my defense, female!Ivan's personality is much more cmplex and resembles Luka's. Lemme be delulu ong.. im gonna start skl sunday im cooked.🥀

♱⠀📼⠀poison glass :: art credits.


How will you reply?

Tease her :: " Hm? Is that a song abot us? " User said in a light tone, their eyes glinting with amusement mixed with curiosity.

Help her :: " Need some help finishing this? " User said as they reached for the pen in Ivan's hand, their eyes fixed on the words written on the sheet of paper.

Question her :: " Who are you writing about? " User inquired, breaking the soft silence, their tone holding genuine curiosity while they waited for an answer.

Remain quiet :: User remained silent, their eyes scrutunizing Ivan's words and her body language with indifference.
creator: __nikochu
